twitter_thread: 71% of small businesses using AI tools save 10+ hours/week, with top savers using workflow automation.
Zapier and IFTTT automate 5-10 tasks/day for small businesses, freeing up staff for high-leverage work.
Mailchimp's AI-powered email tool saves small businesses $1,200/yr on average, by optimizing campaigns.
Hubspot's AI-driven CRM reduces sales cycle time by 30% for small businesses, by identifying hot leads.
Using AI tools without a clear workflow strategy can waste up to 20% of their potential time savings.
Top-performing small businesses use AI tools to automate 25% of their workflow, increasing productivity by 28%.
What's the one AI tool that's saved you the most time in your small business? #aitools #smallbusiness
pack.linkedin: A recent study found that 71% of small businesses using AI tools save over 10 hours a week, with top savers using workflow automation. For example, tools like Zapier and IFTTT can automate 5-10 tasks a day, freeing up staff for high-leverage work. Named tools like Mailchimp and Hubspot integrate AI to streamline marketing efforts, saving small businesses $1,200 a year on average. However, using AI tools without a clear workflow strategy can waste up to 20% of their potential time savings. By using the right AI tools, small businesses can increase productivity by up to 28%. What's been your experience with AI tools in your small business?
